codeReview.summary: Successfully added 2 examples for Lecture 10 sections: tlb-operation-demo for Address Translation and TLB (L10-S8), and memory-protection-demo for Memory Protection (L10-S9). Both examples have correct MASM syntax, comprehensive annotations (6 each), documented common mistakes (4 each), proper provenance, and advanced difficulty. Examples are correctly linked in lectures.json and fulfill VAL-CONTENT-004 and VAL-CODE-001.

summary: Feature lecture10-protection-examples passes scrutiny. Two examples added (tlb-operation-demo and memory-protection-demo) covering L10-S8 (Address Translation and TLB) and L10-S9 (Memory Protection) with proper MASM syntax, annotations explaining key concepts, common mistakes documentation, and provenance metadata. Both examples are linked correctly in lectures.json. Validation assertions VAL-CONTENT-004 and VAL-CODE-001 are satisfied.
